items.name: Charcuterie & Cheese Board
items.description: imported & domestic meats and cheeses, garlic crostini, appropriate accoutrements

items.name: Seafood Tower
items.description: maine lobster tail, snow crab clusters, jumbo shrimp, sesame seed encrusted seared ahi tuna, oysters of the day

items.name: Prince Edward Island Mussels
items.description: sautéed shallot and garlic, white wine cream sauce, fresh herbs (make it mussel frites +11)

items.name: Beef Carpaccio
items.description: roasted heirloom cherry tomato, fried caper, saffron aioli, truffle oil, shaved parmesan

items.name: New Zealand Lamb Lollipops
items.description: hoisin glaze, sriracha, chilled soba noodles

items.name: Graham Cracker Calamari
items.description: baby arugula, subtle anchovy-lemon aioli, sriracha

items.name: Shrimp Cocktail
items.description: four jumbo shrimp, spicy cocktail sauce, additional shrimp $3 each

items.name: Yellowfin Tuna Tartare
items.description: avocado-wasabi mousse, fried sesame wontons

items.name: Escargot Vol Au Vent
items.description: caramelized shallot and garlic, white wine cream sauce, puff pastry

items.name: Arugula Roast Beet Salad
items.description: baby arugula, herb goat cheese, walnuts, white balsamic lime vinaigrette

items.name: **Chateau Caesar Salad
items.description: baby romaine, poached farm raised egg, parmesan tuile, roasted garlic anchovy aioli, bacon lardons

items.name: Wedge Salad
items.description: iceberg, cherry tomatoes, red onion, blue cheese crumbles, bacon, house-made blue cheese dressing

items.name: Chef's Cut
items.description: chef's choice of beef, south african spice rub, truffle mashed potatoes, chef's vegetables. add: lobster tail +20 / snow crab cluster 1/2 lb +$23 / 1 lb +$44

items.name: Filet of Venison
items.description: cocoa espresso rub, potatoes anna, pan-roasted tri-colored carrots, tart cherry demi

items.name: Grilled Chateaubriand (6oz / 8oz)
items.description: certified black angus center-cut filet of beef, stilton blue cheese potato au gratin, port wine demi reduction, roasted carrot puree. add: chef's selection of mushrooms or stilton blue cheese crust +$10 one / +$18 both. add: lobster tail +22 / snow crab cluster 1/2 lb +$23 / 1 lb +$44

items.name: Duck à l'Orange
items.description: maple leaf farms duck, celery root puree, duchess potatoes, candied orange zest, roasted tri-colored carrots, orange gastrique

items.name: Truffled Wild Mushroom Ravioli
items.description: farmer's market mushrooms, baby spinach, roasted garlic-white wine beurre blanc, aged parmesan. add: grilled chicken +$8, shrimp +$12, lobster tail +20

items.name: Chilean Sea Bass
items.description: horseradish panko crusted pan seared sea bass, pea fondue puree, red wine risotto, braised carrots, macerated basil, jicama salad garnish

items.name: Chicken Francese
items.description: chicken breast scallopini, aged parmesan basil egg-crust, roasted fingerling potatoes, house vegetable

items.name: Airline Chicken
items.description: truffle gnocchi, roasted sweet corn, rainbow swiss chard, chicken glace

items.name: Pan Seared Red Snapper
items.description: lemon beurre blanc, dressed arugula salad, saffron risotto. add: make it a lobster risotto! +$20
